title: Enforce Minimum TLS Version with TLSOption
description:
## Enforce Minimum TLS Version with TLSOption

Traefik's `TLSOption` CRD controls the TLS handshake parameters for HTTPS routes: minimum/maximum protocol versions, cipher suites, and client certificate requirements. Enforcing a minimum TLS version is a security baseline requirement in most compliance frameworks.

**Your task:**

In the `traefik-lab` namespace:
1. Create a `TLSOption` named `modern-tls` that:
   - Sets `minVersion` to `VersionTLS12`
   - Disables TLS 1.0 and 1.1 by specifying only `VersionTLS12` and `VersionTLS13` in `sniStrict` is not required
2. Create an `IngressRouteHTTPS` (i.e., an `IngressRoute` on the `websecure` EntryPoint) named `secure-app` that references `modern-tls` via its `tls.options` field, routing `PathPrefix(\`/\`)` to a service named `secure-backend` on port `443`.

```bash
# Verify TLSOption:
kubectl get tlsoption modern-tls -n traefik-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.minVersion}'
# Verify IngressRoute references it:
kubectl get ingressroute secure-app -n traefik-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.tls.options.name}'
```

hints.title: TLSOption resource structure
hints.body: TLSOption is a Traefik CRD. The minVersion field accepts VersionTLS10, VersionTLS11, VersionTLS12, or VersionTLS13.
hints.command:
kubectl apply -f - <<EOF
apiVersion: traefik.io/v1alpha1
kind: TLSOption
metadata:
  name: modern-tls
  namespace: traefik-lab
spec:
  minVersion: VersionTLS12
EOF

hints.title: IngressRoute with TLS options reference
hints.body: Reference the TLSOption in the IngressRoute's spec.tls.options block using name and namespace.
hints.command:
kubectl apply -f - <<'EOF'
apiVersion: traefik.io/v1alpha1
kind: IngressRoute
metadata:
  name: secure-app
  namespace: traefik-lab
spec:
  entryPoints:
  - websecure
  routes:
  - match: PathPrefix(`/`)
    kind: Rule
    services:
    - name: secure-backend
      port: 443
  tls:
    options:
      name: modern-tls
      namespace: traefik-lab
EOF

validation.description: Check that TLSOption enforces TLS 1.2 minimum and the IngressRoute references it

commands.command: kubectl get tlsoption modern-tls -n traefik-lab -o jsonpath='{.metadata.name}'
kubectl get tlsoption modern-tls -n traefik-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.minVersion}'

commands.description: IngressRoute secure-app exists on websecure EntryPoint
commands.command: kubectl get ingressroute secure-app -n traefik-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.entryPoints[0]}'
kubectl get ingressroute secure-app -n traefik-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.tls.options.name}'
